scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=src/html/mcp-app.html vite build && mv dist/src/html/mcp-app.html dist/mcp-app.html && rm -rf dist/src && node_modules/.bin/esbuild src/index.ts src/mcp-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --outdir=dist --format=esm --packages=external --entry-names=[name]
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "tsx --watch src/index.ts"
